mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, SEARCH_ME = #{searchMe} WHERE USER_NO = #{no}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, USER_ID, USER_PWD, NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTH, ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME, GENDER, MINIMI, CREATE_DATE, ACORN, STATUS FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #{id}

SELECT C.USER_NO, P.PRODUCT_CODE AS "P_PRODUCT_CODE" , P.CATEGORY_CODE AS "P_CATEGORY_CODE", P.PRODUCT_NAME AS "P_PRODUCT_NAME", P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM CART C INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (P.PRODUCT_CODE = C.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE USER_NO = #{no} AND P.STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT B.BUY_IDX, B.USER_NO, B.PAY_DATE, B.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM BUY B INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (B.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE USER_NO = #{no} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY PAY_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUY B INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (B.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BUY B INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (B.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(PAY_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT B.BUY_IDX, B.USER_NO, B.PAY_DATE, B.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM BUY B INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (B.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE USER_NO = #{no} AND STATUS = 'Y' AND DATE_FORMAT(PAY_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY PAY_DATE DESC

SELECT QNA_NO, USER_NO, QNA_TITLE, QNA_EMAIL, QC.QNA_CATEGORY_CODE, QC.QNA_CATEGORY AS QNA_CATEGORY_NAME, QNA_CONTENT, QNA_Q_DATE, QNA_ANSWER, QNA_STATUS, QNA_A_DATE FROM QNA Q INNER JOIN QNA_CATEGORY QC ON (QC.QNA_CATEGORY_CODE = Q.QNA_CATEGORY) WHERE USER_NO = #{no}

SELECT REPORT_NO , R.CATEGORYCODE , RC.CATEGORYNAME , R.CONTENT , R.DATE , R.STATUS, R.RESULT , R.ALLPK_NO , R.REPORT_CODE , M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME FROM REPORT R INNER JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY RC ON (R.CATEGORYCODE = RC.CATEGORYCODE) INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (R.USER_ID = M.USER_ID) WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT REPORT_NO , R.CATEGORYCODE , RC.CATEGORYNAME , R.CONTENT , R.DATE , R.STATUS, R.RESULT , R.ALLPK_NO , R.REPORT_CODE , M.USER_NO AS M_USER_NO, M.USER_ID AS M_USER_ID, M.NAME AS M_NAME FROM REPORT R INNER JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY RC ON (R.CATEGORYCODE = RC.CATEGORYCODE) INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON (R.USER_ID = M.USER_ID) WHERE R.USER_ID = #{userId} AND REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}

SELECT QNA_NO, USER_NO, QNA_TITLE, QNA_EMAIL, QC.QNA_CATEGORY_CODE, QC.QNA_CATEGORY AS QNA_CATEGORY_NAME, QNA_CONTENT, QNA_Q_DATE, QNA_ANSWER, QNA_STATUS, QNA_A_DATE FROM QNA Q INNER JOIN QNA_CATEGORY QC ON (QC.QNA_CATEGORY_CODE = Q.QNA_CATEGORY) WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND QNA_NO = #{qnaNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO BUY ( BUY_IDX, PRODUCT_CODE, USER_NO ) VALUES
( (SELECT NEXTVAL('buy_seq') FROM DUAL), #{code}, #{userNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(T_DATE) AS T_DATE, MINIHOME_NO , T_COUNT , T_TOTAL FROM MINIHOME_TOTAL WHERE MINIHOME_NO = #{minihomeNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(T_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d')
